name: Horseradish Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the heavy cream until quite thick.
2. Add grated horseradish. If using evaporated horseradish, mix it with a tablespoon of cold water to absorb before adding it to the cream.
3. Slowly pour in lemon juice while stirring constantly.
4. Season with salt and paprika.
5. Serve very cold. This dressing is especially good with tomatoes.
